# velia_server_group (Resource)

Creates a server group in Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "velia_server_group" "test" {
  name = "23"
  color = "blue"
  servers = ["123"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (String) Server group color.
- `name` (String) Server group name.
- `servers` (List of String) List of servers.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server group ID returned by Velia.
